name: PrivHound: Cross-user profile → creds → login → admin (variable path)
description: Variable-length paths combining PHCanAccessProfile and PHCanLoginAs to reach an admin target.
query:
MATCH p=(u:PHUser)-[*1..6]->(t:PHPrivTarget)
WHERE any(r IN relationships(p) WHERE type(r) = "PHCanAccessProfile")
  AND any(r IN relationships(p) WHERE type(r) = "PHCanLoginAs")
RETURN p
